applied_optimizations.name: Triton LayerNorm kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented custom Triton LayerNorm kernel with proper handling of masked elements in variance calculation. Fixed bug where masked elements (padded to power-of-2 BLOCK_SIZE) were incorrectly contributing to variance.

applied_optimizations.name: Triton GELU kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented custom Triton GELU kernel with manual tanh implementation (ROCm compatible - no tl.libdevice). Uses tl.math.exp for tanh computation.

attempted_but_failed.name: Fused QKV kernel
attempted_but_failed.error: Initial fused QKV kernel implementation had indexing bugs and was incomplete

notes: Critical bug fix: LayerNorm kernel must use tl.where to zero out masked elements before variance calculation when BLOCK_SIZE > n_cols
ROCm Triton does not support tl.libdevice.tanh - must use manual implementation with tl.math.exp
BLOCK_SIZE must be power of 2 in Triton
Current implementation uses PyTorch for attention (qkv split, matmul, softmax) - potential for further optimization with fused attention kernel

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output, same as trials 2 and 3. The agent keeps crashing — likely attempting too-complex changes. Need to give extremely specific, minimal instructions to make one high-impact chan

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 is the 4th consecutive crash with no output. The agent keeps attempting complex changes and failing silently. Need to give ultra-specific, single-change instructions with the exact code to mod

global_notes: Achieved 1.235x speedup (12.3ms -> 9.96ms) with Triton LayerNorm and GELU kernels
Further optimization opportunities: fused QKV projection, fused attention (flash attention style), fused MLP
